title: 21A American IPA
text: A hop-forward, moderately strong American pale ale showcasing modern American or New World hop character. This is a short paraphrased example, not full guideline text.

title: Dry Hop Timing
text: Dry hopping is commonly used to increase hop aroma after active fermentation has slowed, while limiting oxygen exposure.

title: Citrus Hop Aroma
text: Citrus descriptors may include grapefruit, orange, lemon, lime, or zest-like notes depending on variety and process.
